titles.en: Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Habib Ibn Al-mu'alla
Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Habib Ibn Al-mu'alla

segments: ه عن حبيب بن المعلّى فقد رويته عن أبي- رضي اللّه عنه- عن سعد بن عبد اللّه، عن محمّد بن الوليد الخزّاز، عن حمّاد بن عثمان، عن حبيب بن المعلّى الخثعميّ‌.
arabic.text: ه عن حبيب بن المعلّى فقد رويته عن أبي- رضي اللّه عنه- عن سعد بن عبد اللّه، عن محمّد بن الوليد الخزّاز، عن حمّاد بن عثمان، عن حبيب بن المعلّى الخثعميّ‌.

segments: Everything in this book that is narrated from Habib ibn Al-Mu'alla has been transmitted by me from my father - may Allah (swt) be pleased with him - from Sa'd ibn Abdullah, from Muhammad ibn Al-Walid Al-Khazzaz, from Hammad ibn 'Uthman, from Habib ibn Al-Mu'alla Al-Khath'ami.
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text: Everything in this book that is narrated from Habib ibn Al-Mu'alla has been transmitted by me from my father - may Allah (swt) be pleased with him - from Sa'd ibn Abdullah, from Muhammad ibn Al-Walid Al-Khazzaz, from Hammad ibn 'Uthman, from Habib ibn Al-Mu'alla Al-Khath'ami.
